positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a rising sun casting warm geometric patterns across a calm ocean surface. The composition features strong horizontal lines and a central point of light. The color palette is restricted to warm golds, deep indigo, and muted turquoise, creating high contrast and a serene mood. Clean silhouette art style, suitable for apparel printing, vector quality, graphic novel aesthetic, symmetrical composition, vibrant yet refined color blocking, perfect for a t-shirt graphic.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blur, artifact, noise, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy background, grainy, cropped
